market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Why the rise of open source AI isn’t hurting Anthropic … yet
articles.description: Open-source models’ success isn’t coming at the expense of frontier labs. Instead, they each seem to capture two phases of the same life-cycle.

articles.title: Microsoft joins AI cost-cutting trend by relying more on its own models
articles.description: Microsoft is the latest Silicon Valley giant to cut back on its AI spending.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: BlackRock-backed Securitize slides 40% after SPAC debut despite tokenization boom
articles.description: The decline fits into a pattern of recently-public digital asset companies sliding after debut, Arca's Jeff Dorman said.

articles.title: Kraken wins $22M arbitration against former auditor Mazars
articles.description: The crypto exchange's parent company says Mazars' withdrawal from its 2022 audit caused millions in damages and tied the dispute to Operation Chokepoint 2.0.

articles.title: Discord admits AI moderation bug wrongfully banned users over harmless images
articles.description: The company confirmed that the issue had been affecting accounts since May, with an additional 200 users banned over the weekend before its team identified and fixed the problem.

articles.title: Google’s Pixel event is set for August 12
articles.description: Google's upcoming event in August will introduce new Pixel devices.

articles.title: Crypto exchange Kraken is trying to become a bank in Europe
articles.description: Kraken's focus is on Lithuania as the jurisdiction to secure the license, according to a person familiar with the plans.

articles.title: USDT wins payments, USDC wins DeFi as stablecoins diverge: Dune
articles.description: Dune data shows Tether's USDT has become crypto’s dominant payments stablecoin while Circle's USDC powers DeFi, highlighting how blockchain choice shapes stablecoin use.

articles.title: Netflix dabbles in shorter video content with its new set of publisher deals with Variety, others
articles.description: Netflix is bringing 2- to 20-minute videos to its platform through new partnerships with digital publishers, including Rolling Stone and Variety.

articles.title: Hacked, leaked, and held for ransom: The worst breaches of 2026 so far
articles.description: From a massive DOGE data breach and the hacking of critical energy and water systems to the hack of an FBI surveillance system, here are the most damaging security incidents and data breaches of 2026.

articles.title: Tether invests in Mercado Bitcoin as blockchain finance expands in Latin America
articles.description: Mercado Bitcoin will use the funding to expand tokenized finance across Latin America, adding to Tether's growing portfolio of infrastructure investments.

articles.title: Nigel Farage to resign from UK Parliament amid crypto “gift” scandal, will stand in by-election
articles.description: The Reform party leader and Brexit champion confirmed that he was the subject of probes by UK authorities following reports of what he called “gifts” from figures tied to cry pto ventures.

articles.title: SpaceX IPO powers record $3.86 billion in tokenized equities trading in June
articles.description: SpaceX tokens captured $1.19 billion, or 31% of total monthly volume, with Backpack’s SPCX leading trading at $1.08 billion.

articles.title: Institutional crypto exchange EDX lands $76M from SBI Holdings
articles.description: The funding round comes as institutional investors continue backing crypto market infrastructure despite slower venture investment across the digital asset sector.

articles.title: U.S. SEC to propose crypto rule as soon as this month to ease startups, fundraising
articles.description: A newly updated agenda from the securities regulator shows so-called Reg Crypto high on its near-term list.

articles.title: Bitcoin bulls battle for $63K as Micron stock eyes 10% drop in US chip sell-off
articles.description: Bitcoin came off two-week highs while US stocks dipped and John Bollinger described BTC price action as "at a critical point."

articles.title: VC firm Chemistry is raising $500M for its second fund
articles.description: Chemistry Ventures, the VC firm launched by Bessemer, Index Ventures, and Andreessen Horowitz alums, is raising $500M for its second fund.

articles.title: Bitcoin Covenants part 3: SIGHASH_ANYPREVOUT
articles.description: APO lets a Bitcoin signature authorize any compatible UTXO rather than one fixed outpoint. It allows for rebindable pre-signed transactions for Lightning, vaults, and layer-2 protocols without new key management overhead.

articles.title: Analysts see more upside for SpaceX as post-IPO research begins
articles.description: Major brokerages initiated coverage on Tuesday with mostly buy ratings following the company's $75 billion June IPO.
